title: Klaipėda, Klaipėda County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Klaipėda, Klaipėda County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Klaipėda is a city in Klaipėda County with a population of 147,892. Lithuania’s major port city on the Baltic Sea, with a charming German-influenced old town, the nearby Curonian Spit, and a bustling maritime atmosphere.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
